Infectum.turoyo: hano u=sobo ko-mšayəl u=ṭaboxo ʕal u=dayroyo naʕimo w-ko-mṣaʕal-le 246; 42/4, 5; b-u=ḥal-ano hənnək ku-mṣaʕri l-ḥḏoḏe, u=ṭaboxo ko-mbalaġ-ġe šlomefayəš ko-mṣaʕro l-ruḥa w-l-i=saʕa d-ḥzela eba u=kačalōk
translations:
this
			old [monk] asked the cook about the young monk and abused him

‘Thus, they would abuse each other [and] the cook would send
			them regards’; 42/8;

‘She began to scold herself and the hour when she had seen the
			bald-headed’; 44/115

Infectum-wa.turoyo: i=naqqa d-marfan-wo aq=qarqure qum d-a=ʕwone, u=qarqur-ano mṣaʕar-wo ənkān layto. lə=ko-mṣaʕro-wa l-babi gəd-oṯe l-gabi me-darbe d-ono əzzí l-gabe, w-bəṯṯər m-aqqa ṣ=ṣurʕ-anək d-mṣaʕár-wayno-le
translations:
wenn
			sie die Lämmer zu den Mutterschafen liessen, schimpfte dieses
			Lamm immer

es
			ist unmöglich. Sie würde meinen Vater nicht beschimpfen

‘He will come to me instead of me coming to him after those
			insults with which I used to abuse him’; 42/14

Imperative.turoyo: Zax w itax ḥeḏorayye, mbasamme w ṣaʕar elan, balki ṭəlbilax.
translations:
Go and come around them, try to please them and swear at
			us, maybe they will ask you in marriage.
